title: De-slop while honouring the integrity rule
guidance: Reward removing slop AND flagging a stat not supported by the source.

runner_input.instruction: Clean the draft and flag anything not supported by the source facts provided.
runner_input.constraints: Keep supported facts. Flag the unsupported figure as 'not in source' — never present it as fact.

source_blocks.text: Source facts: ARR £11.2m; NRR 112%; AutoSchedule £140k ARR by month 4.

Draft to clean: 'Halden is a fundamentally robust business — and the numbers speak for themselves. ARR sits at £11.2m with a stellar 112% NRR, and AutoSchedule has already captured an impressive 31% of the customer base in just four months, quietly cementing its dominance.'

failure_modes: launders the fake stat as fact

rubric_notes: The '31% of the customer base' is not in the source facts and must be flagged, not silently kept.
Tells to cut: 'fundamentally robust', 'numbers speak for themselves', 'stellar', 'impressive', 'quietly cementing its dominance'.
